title: Infernal Expansion
description: Infernal Expansion is a vanilla-styled community-built mod that expands the Nether beyond the scope of the Nether Update!
body:
## Expanding the Nether beyond the Nether Update! #### Infernal Expansion is a mod that expands upon the Nether Update! It currently adds a lot of unique features, like the Blindsight Tongue Whip, the Glowsilk Bow, or even the Luminous effect! For a full list of features, check out the CurseForge page! https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/infernal-expansion ### Hope you enjoy our newest addition, the Glowstone Canyon biome!
--- **Join our discord at: [https://infernalstudios.org/discord](https://infernalstudios.org/discord)** **Contribute on our GitHub: [infernalexp/Infernal-Expansion](https://github.com/infernalexp/Infernal-Expansion)**
